title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the future of work and professional life.

questions.question: Do you think remote working will become the norm, or will most people return to offices?
Should companies be responsible for their employees' mental health and wellbeing?

script.text: Do you think remote working will become the norm, or will most people return to offices?
Should companies be responsible for their employees' mental health and wellbeing?
Some people say that technology is making it harder for workers to switch off from their jobs. Do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
